errors.description: List of grammar and spelling errors found

index.description: Position of the error in the text (1-based)

mistake.description: The incorrect text that was found

category.description: Error category: Grammar, Spelling, Punctuation, Capitalization, or Confused Words

hint.description: Structural hint about what kind of change is needed, without revealing the answer

rule.description: Short name of the grammar rule violated

explanation.description: Explanation of the rule tailored for Russian-speaking English learners

context.description: Surrounding context where the error was found

cleaned_text.description: The cleaned version of the input text

warning.description: Warning message if the API was unreachable
